《馬卡報》表示，施丹已經和高層商議好了今夏皇馬的收購目標，他們需要1名中堅、1名左閘、2名中場和1名前鋒。皇馬為這些位置謀劃的備選，就多達23人之多。

儘管皇馬已經簽下了米利唐，但他們還想要再簽下一名中堅，阿積士的迪列治就是目標之一，他的能力已無需再去考察，在歐聯賽場上，他已經幫助阿積士將皇馬淘汰出局，另外巴塞和馬體會也對他非常感興趣。另外，國米的史堅尼亞和拿玻里的高列巴尼也在皇馬的名單之上。

在左閘的位置上，皇馬還沒有特別看好的球員，車路士的馬高斯-阿朗素、華倫西亞的加亞甚至出自巴塞青訓的基莫度都是他們的備選獵物，另外，皇馬也對拜仁的左閘艾拿巴非常感興趣。

Sir Jim Ratcliffe may bid for Chelsea next after striking deal to sponsor Team Sky

Sir Jim Ratcliffe retains an interest in buying Chelsea on top of his takeover of Team Sky, which is expected to be confirmed today. The petrochemicals billionaire has been exploring whether to purchase the London club from Roman Abramovich but has balked at an asking price of at least £2.5 billion.

Ratcliffe, 66, the wealthiest British person, is set to become an increasingly influential figure in sport in this country with the confirmation that Team Sky will become Team Ineos. As The Times reported last month, the keen amateur cyclist has been in discussions with Sir Dave Brailsford about providing the £35 million annual costs to keep the team going beyond 2019, and the deal is due to be confirmed imminently.

Money is not an issue for a man worth £21 billion according to The Sunday Times Rich List thanks to his founding of Ineos. The tax exile, who lives in Monaco, where Chris Froome and other Team Sky riders are based, has a record of putting his wealth into sport.

Last year, he invested £110 million in Sir Ben Ainslie’s Ineos Team UK, renaming the sailing team after his petrochemicals company with the aim of competing for the America’s Cup in New Zealand in 2021. In 2017, he bought FC Lausanne-Sport, who play in Switzerland’s top football league and has looked into buying Chelsea where he holds a season ticket despite growing up in Manchester as a United fan.
